title: SELECT statement throws str_cast exception
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_schema.test (type String NOT NULL, output String NOT NULL, output_min_time_value_1 Int64, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
SELECT output_min_time_value_1 FROM test_schema.test WHERE type = 'OUTPUT' AND output = 'greet_person' OR output_min_time_value_1 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: SELECT statement with specific WHERE clause
